home.lede: Housely is a hand-picked register of private residences across coastlines, vineyards and quiet capitals. Reserve in seconds. Pay the keys at the door.
home.howStep1Body: Pay only the platform fee to lock the dates. The rest stays in your pocket until you arrive.
home.howStep2Body: The host's direct line is revealed the moment your reservation is confirmed.
home.howStep3Body: Settle the remaining balance in person, before keys change hands. Cash, transfer, or card — the host decides.
home.trustTitle: Private listings. Predictable pricing. Zero surprises.
home.trustBody: Every residence is verified. Every host is reachable. Every cent is accounted for — split clearly between what you pay now and what you settle on arrival.

filters.title: The Register
filters.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No residences} one {# residence} other {# residences}} in rotation
filters.search: Search by city or villa name
filters.empty: Nothing in rotation matches that. Try widening your filters.

property.ownerHidden: Host details revealed once your reservation is confirmed.
property.noReviews: No notes yet — be the first to leave one.

book.title: Reserve this residence
book.subtitle: We need a few details for the host. Your information is shared only with the host of this property.
book.notesPlaceholder: Arrival window, accessibility needs, anything that helps the host prepare...
book.deadline: Settled before keys are handed over
book.agree: By continuing you agree to settle the remaining balance directly with the host before check-in.

checkout.title: Secure your dates
checkout.subtitle: You're paying only the platform reservation fee. The rest is settled with the host on arrival.
checkout.deadline: Pay the remaining balance before the host hands over the keys.
checkout.demoNote: Demo checkout — no real charge is made.

confirmation.title: Your reservation is confirmed.
confirmation.subtitle: Save your reference and the host's details. They'll be expecting you.
confirmation.balanceNote: Bring this amount on the day of check-in. The host will accept payment before keys are delivered.

auth.signInSubtitle: Pick up where you left off.
auth.registerSubtitle: We'll keep your reservations in one place.

account.title: Your account
account.noReservations: Nothing booked yet. The register is just over there →
